--- 
title: |
  Extended Data Figure 3
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---



```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| include: false
#| label: library_data_imports

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(glmnet)
library(survival)
library(survminer)

gu_cohort_data <- readRDS("../data/gu_survey_cohort.RDS") 



```
# Panel A
Lasso regression raw fiber intake
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| include: true
#| label: lasso_model_raw_fiber


x <- model.matrix(~ fiber_5g_increment + ageby10 + ecog_1to5_final + 
                    cancer_RCCvsUC_NAME + stage.simplified.factor + 
                    bmi + WhiteRace + latinx.binary + Impact.TMB.Imputed +
                    sex + smoking.binary + calor + 
                    abx_3mo_yn_imputed + pbx_now_imputed,
                  data = gu_cohort_data)[, -1]

y <- Surv(gu_cohort_data$pfs_mo, gu_cohort_data$pod_status)


set.seed(42)
n_sims <- 100
seeds <- sample(1:10000, n_sims)

# Store coefficients from each run
coef_matrix <- matrix(NA, nrow = n_sims, ncol = ncol(x))
colnames(coef_matrix) <- colnames(x)

for (i in 1:n_sims) {
  set.seed(seeds[i])
  fit <- cv.glmnet(x, y, family = "cox", alpha = 1)
  coef_matrix[i, ] <- as.numeric(coef(fit, s = "lambda.min"))
}

# Summary: mean, median, and SD of coefficients across runs
coef_summary <- data.frame(
  Variable = colnames(coef_matrix),
  Mean_coef = round(apply(coef_matrix, 2, mean), 4),
  Median_coef = round(apply(coef_matrix, 2, median), 4),
  SD_coef = round(apply(coef_matrix, 2, sd), 4),
  Mean_HR = round(exp(apply(coef_matrix, 2, mean)), 4),
  Median_HR = round(exp(apply(coef_matrix, 2, median)), 4),
  Pct_nonzero = round(apply(coef_matrix != 0, 2, mean) * 100, 1)
)

print(coef_summary, row.names = FALSE)


coef_summary <- coef_summary %>%
  mutate(Variable = recode(Variable,
                           "fiber_5g_bin" = "Daily fiber intake (continuous variable)",
                           "ageby10" = "Age",
                           "ecog_1to5_final" = "ECOG PS",
                           "cancer_RCCvsUC_NAMEUC" = "Cancer type (UC vs RCC)",
                           "stage.simplified.factorStage IV" = "Stage IV",
                           "bmi" = "BMI",
                           "WhiteRace" = "Race",
                           "Impact.TMB.Imputed" = "TMB",
                           "smoking.binary" = "Smoking history",
                           "sex" = "Sex",
                           "calor" = "Daily caloric intake",
                           "latinx.binaryNon-Latinx" = "Ethnicity",
                           "abx_3mo_yn_imputed1" = "Antibiotics",
                           "pbx_now_imputedYes" = "Probiotics"
                           
  ))

coef_summary <- coef_summary %>%
  arrange(Pct_nonzero) %>%
  mutate(Variable = factor(Variable, 
                           levels = c(setdiff(Variable, "Daily fiber intake (continuous variable)"),
                                      "Daily fiber intake (continuous variable)")))



ggplot(coef_summary, aes(x = reorder(Variable, Pct_nonzero), y = Pct_nonzero / 100)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#0072B2", alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), expand = c(0, 0.01)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, lty = 2, color = "grey50") +
  labs(
    title = "Robustness of predictors in Lasso Cox regression",
    subtitle = paste("Based on", n_sims, "replications with varying cross-validation folds"),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of runs where variable was retained"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title.position = "plot"
  )


```
# Panel B
Lasso regression with fiber density
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| include: true
#| label: lasso_model_fiber_density

x <- model.matrix(~ gram_fiber_per_Kcal_aboveRecommended + ageby10 + ecog_1to5_final + 
                    cancer_RCCvsUC_NAME + stage.simplified.factor + 
                    bmi + WhiteRace + latinx.binary + Impact.TMB.Imputed +
                    sex + smoking.binary + calor + 
                    abx_3mo_yn_imputed + pbx_now_imputed,
                  data = gu_cohort_data)[, -1]

y <- Surv(gu_cohort_data$pfs_mo, gu_cohort_data$pod_status)

set.seed(42)
n_sims <- 100
seeds <- sample(1:10000, n_sims)

# Store coefficients from each run
coef_matrix <- matrix(NA, nrow = n_sims, ncol = ncol(x))
colnames(coef_matrix) <- colnames(x)

for (i in 1:n_sims) {
  set.seed(seeds[i])
  fit <- cv.glmnet(x, y, family = "cox", alpha = 1)
  coef_matrix[i, ] <- as.numeric(coef(fit, s = "lambda.min"))
}

# Summary: mean, median, and SD of coefficients across runs
coef_summary <- data.frame(
  Variable = colnames(coef_matrix),
  Mean_coef = round(apply(coef_matrix, 2, mean), 4),
  Median_coef = round(apply(coef_matrix, 2, median), 4),
  SD_coef = round(apply(coef_matrix, 2, sd), 4),
  Mean_HR = round(exp(apply(coef_matrix, 2, mean)), 4),
  Median_HR = round(exp(apply(coef_matrix, 2, median)), 4),
  Pct_nonzero = round(apply(coef_matrix != 0, 2, mean) * 100, 1)
)

print(coef_summary, row.names = FALSE)


coef_summary <- coef_summary %>%
  mutate(Variable = recode(Variable,
                           "gram_fiber_per_Kcal_aboveRecommended" = "Dietary fiber density of 15+ g/1,000 kcal",
                           "ageby10" = "Age",
                           "ecog_1to5_final" = "ECOG PS",
                           "cancer_RCCvsUC_NAMEUC" = "Cancer type (UC vs RCC)",
                           "stage.simplified.factorStage IV" = "Stage IV",
                           "bmi" = "BMI",
                           "WhiteRace" = "Race",
                           "Impact.TMB.Imputed" = "TMB",
                           "smoking.binary" = "Smoking history",
                           "sex" = "Sex",
                           "calor" = "Daily caloric intake",
                           "latinx.binaryNon-Latinx" = "Ethnicity",
                           "abx_3mo_yn_imputed1" = "Antibiotics",
                           "pbx_now_imputedYes" = "Probiotics"
  ))

coef_summary <- coef_summary %>%
  arrange(Pct_nonzero) %>%
  mutate(Variable = factor(Variable, 
                           levels = c(setdiff(Variable, "Dietary fiber density of 15+ g/1,000 kcal"),
                                      "Dietary fiber density of 15+ g/1,000 kcal")))



ggplot(coef_summary, aes(x = Variable, y = Pct_nonzero / 100)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#0072B2", alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), expand = c(0, 0.01)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, lty = 2, color = "grey50") +
  labs(
    title = "Robustness of predictors in Lasso Cox regression",
    subtitle = paste("Based on", n_sims, "replications with varying cross-validation folds"),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion of runs where variable was retained"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title.position = "plot"
  )

```
